name: WF STEP3 - Loom Research Script (Enrichment + AI Brief + Notion)

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggered by WF_STEP1 when a LinkedIn connection is accepted. Receives: notion_page_id, full_name, linkedin_url, company, title.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for batch processing. Uses Notion query to pull contacts with Status = 'Connection Accepted' that haven't been researched yet.

nodes.name: Get Unresearched Contacts
nodes.notes: For manual runs: pulls all contacts with 'Connection Accepted' status that need research.

nodes.name: Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Merges webhook (single contact) and manual trigger (batch) inputs into a consistent array format.

nodes.name: Apify LinkedIn Scraper
nodes.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn profile for current experience, headline, company details. Uses existing Apify actor (same as Loom Research Script).

nodes.name: Score & Enrich Lead
nodes.notes: Scores lead from Apify data: employee count (0-5) + title (0-3) = max 8 pts. Tiers: T1 (7-8) | T2 (5-6) | T3 (3-4) | T4 (0-2).

nodes.name: Claude: Generate Loom Brief
nodes.notes: Generates personalized Loom video research brief using Claude Sonnet. Includes script intro, pain points, personalization hooks, and talking points.

nodes.name: Update Notion with Research
nodes.notes: Updates Notion contact with enriched company data, priority score, and AI-generated Loom research brief. Status set to 'Research Complete'.
